title: Joint Stiffness in Older Adults: 11 Effective Herbal Teas
description: Ginkgo biloba teas have been used for centuries to alleviate joint stiffness and improve mobility. The leaves of the Ginkgo biloba tree contain a unique combination of flavonoids, terpenoids, and bilobalide, which work together to reduce inflammation and relax muscles. The flavonoids, in particular, have antioxidant properties that help protect joints from damage caused by free radicals. The terpenoids, on the other hand, have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce swelling and ...
